data.content: Implementation review rejection: Three issues remain. (1) SessionCard, ResponseEntryRow, PromptEntryRow, InteractionPicker, and FilterDropdown all have hardcoded dark palette colors (#1a1a2e, #16162a, #e0e0e0, text-white/xx) — they do not respond to the light theme toggle. The conversation-log-theme.ts helper needs to be expanded to cover these subcomponents and they need to consume the theme object. (2) Font contrast in light mode is poor because subcomponent backgrounds and text are still dark-on-dark even when the parent container switches to light. (3) The History Debugger is squeezed into a 50/50 grid split (grid-cols-2). It should be converted to a full-width tab so the embedded terminal has adequate space.
